case_title: PORTOFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. MARK DOLLEY et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTOFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DOLLEY, MARK DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-20-2012
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT UNABLE TO SERVE MARK DOLLEY FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTOFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTOFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED AUG-20-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DOLLEY, MARK
AMENDED SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTOFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED AUG-20-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DOLLEY, MARK
DECLARATION RE: VENUE PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B) AND CCP 396(A) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTOFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT (DEFAULT AND CLERK'S JUDGMENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTOFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DOLLEY, MARK
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $236.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT DOLLEY, MARK
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
DECLARATION RE: 1) REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT [CCP 585] 2) COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS [EVID 1550] 3) INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTOFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
DECLARATION RE: COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 1033(B)(2); WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES RE: COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 1033(B)(2); WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES FI LED BY PLAINTIFF PORTOFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTOFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOLLEY, MARK $2,401.76 PRINCIPAL, $362.34 INTEREST, $236.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,000.10, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO STANISLAUS COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DOLLEY, MARK
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO STANISLAUS COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT DOLLEY, MARK
